title: Claude Code Auto Mode
summary: Anthropic dropped auto mode for Claude Code—it'll run actions with fewer manual approvals while safeguards check for destructive behavior. Literally game-changing for devs who are tired of clicking 'approve' a thousand times.
takeaway: Claude can now execute tasks without you babysitting every step

title: Atomic Chat
summary: Your own offline chatbot fr—no tracking, no cloud uploads, completely free. Perfect if you're paranoid about privacy or just want AI that actually stays local.
takeaway: Private AI that runs 100% on your device, zero data sent anywhere

title: Meshy 3D Model Generation
summary: Bambu Lab integrated Meshy into MakerWorld—snap a pic, get a STL file ready to print. No CAD skills needed, lowkey magic for makers and designers.
takeaway: Turn any photo into a print-ready 3D model in minutes
